tasks.label: Build VST3 (Debug)
tasks.command: bash gen_build_info.sh && cd Builds/MacOSX && xcodebuild -project LoopBreaker.xcodeproj -scheme "LoopBreaker - VST3" -configuration Debug build

tasks.label: Build VST3 (Release)
tasks.command: bash gen_build_info.sh && cd Builds/MacOSX && xcodebuild -project LoopBreaker.xcodeproj -scheme "LoopBreaker - VST3" -configuration Release build

tasks.label: Build AU (Debug)
tasks.command: bash gen_build_info.sh && cd Builds/MacOSX && xcodebuild -project LoopBreaker.xcodeproj -scheme "LoopBreaker - AU" -configuration Debug build

tasks.label: Build AU (Release)
tasks.command: bash gen_build_info.sh && cd Builds/MacOSX && xcodebuild -project LoopBreaker.xcodeproj -scheme "LoopBreaker - AU" -configuration Release build

tasks.label: Build All (Debug)
tasks.command: bash gen_build_info.sh && cd Builds/MacOSX && xcodebuild -project LoopBreaker.xcodeproj -scheme "LoopBreaker - VST3" -configuration Debug build && xcodebuild -project LoopBreaker.xcodeproj -scheme "LoopBreaker - AU" -configuration Debug build

tasks.label: Build All (Release)
tasks.command: bash gen_build_info.sh && cd Builds/MacOSX && xcodebuild -project LoopBreaker.xcodeproj -scheme "LoopBreaker - VST3" -configuration Release build && xcodebuild -project LoopBreaker.xcodeproj -scheme "LoopBreaker - AU" -configuration Release build
